en: A: Hello, what are you looking for?
B: I want to buy a cup.
A: Hello, what are you looking for?
B: I want to buy a hat.

ab: kelan ka kopu’ mamu aw? pabiniy cu.
ch: A:我要買杯子，你們有賣嗎?
en: A: I want to buy a cup, do you sell them?
B: Yes, how many do you want to buy?
A: Do you sell betel nut?

ab: ungat wa! ini min paginbiniy ci sabiki’.
en: B: No, we don't sell betel nut.
A: I want to buy rice.
B: How many packs do you want to buy?
A: Give me three packs.
A: I want to buy sweet potatoes.

ab: waṟal su’un maginbiniy kora’ ka ngahi’ la.
en: B: All the sweet potatoes are sold out.

ab: mpabiniy cu ci sa’ing susuk na abura’.
en: A: I want to buy two bottles of oil.

ab: mastahaṟ ci utux susuk baliy la.
en: B: We only have one bottle left.
A: Go buy me eggs.
B: How many pounds do you want to buy?

ab: maha’ pira’ ka baṟing babinarun su’?
en: A: How many pounds of eggs do you want to buy?
B: I want to buy two catties.

ab: mpabiniy cu ci sa’ing binnahlan na inuw.
en: A: I want to buy two green onions.

ab: tugal binahlan nel sani, agal kora’ la!
en: B: There are three left, all for you!

ab: pira’ pila’ ka utux cinabu’ na box hani?
en: A: How much is this bag of rice?
B: $200 for a pack.

ab: mapusal utux kulabuy kora’. anak mapusal kulabuy la ga.
en: A:The total is $21, just count $20.
B: Thank you.

ab: ni, ma’ira mapgan ṟamagal ka kulabuy hani.
en: A: Here's $95.

ab: patong cu miniy tikiy, patehki mu utux kabhul kulabuy.
en: B: I'll buy some more, and make up 100 yuan.
A:All $510.
B: Count me in for $500, okay?

ab: kahyuw tikiy aw, maskitu’ caṟung ka hani?
ch: A:這個太貴了，可以算便宜一點嗎?
en: A: It's too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ab: aṟat wa, mahyuw caṟung ka hani la.
ch: B:不行，這個已經很便宜了。
en: B: No, this is already very cheap.
A: I want this packet of cookies.

ab: matul kulabuy ka kamce’ hani, amol ka babinarun su’ na?
ch: B:這餅乾30元，還需要別的東西嗎?
en: B: $30 for the cookies, anything else you need?
